CVE-2012-0178.notes: SYSRET — x64 only. Very reliable on Win7/2008R2 SP1 x64 with MSF module.

CVE-2018-8440.notes: ALPC LPE — all Windows before Sep 2018. Public PoC reliable.

CVE-2020-0787.notes: BITS service EoP — requires BITS running. SecWiki binary available.

CVE-2025-21335.notes: Hyper-V VSP 0day — triplet of ITW zero-days in Jan 2025

CVE-2025-21275.desc: Windows App Package Installer EoP — local SYSTEM (publicly disclosed before patch, Jan 2025)
CVE-2025-21275.notes: App Package Installer LPE — publicly known before patch, similar chain to CVE-2021-41379

CVE-2025-21418.desc: AFD.sys (Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock) EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW as 0day Feb 2025
CVE-2025-21418.notes: AFD.sys 0day — same driver class as MS11-046/CVE-2024-38193. Exploited ITW Feb 2025.

CVE-2025-21391.desc: Windows Storage EoP — local deletion of files leading to privilege escalation, exploited ITW Feb 2025
CVE-2025-21391.notes: Windows Storage EoP via file deletion — unusual primitive, ITW Feb 2025. No public PoC.

CVE-2025-24983.desc: Win32k use-after-free — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW since Mar 2023 via PipeMagic backdoor (ESET, patched Mar 2025)
CVE-2025-24983.notes: Win32k UAF — exploited since 2023 via PipeMagic before patched in Mar 2025 (ESET). 2-year ITW window.

CVE-2025-24984.desc: Windows NTFS info disclosure via USB device — partial heap memory leak, exploited ITW (requires physical access)
CVE-2025-24984.notes: Physical access required (USB). Unusual ITW use — likely targeted/espionage rather than opportunistic.

CVE-2025-24985.desc: Windows Fast FAT File System Driver integer overflow — RCE via mounting crafted VHD, exploited ITW Mar 2025
CVE-2025-24985.notes: Fast FAT RCE via VHD mount — pair with LPE for full chain. Exploited ITW Mar 2025.

CVE-2025-24991.desc: Windows NTFS info disclosure — heap memory leak via crafted VHD mount, exploited ITW Mar 2025
CVE-2025-24991.notes: NTFS info disclosure — exploited ITW likely as part of chain. Low direct impact alone.

CVE-2025-24993.desc: Windows NTFS heap buffer overflow — RCE via mounting crafted VHD, exploited ITW Mar 2025
CVE-2025-24993.notes: NTFS heap overflow RCE via VHD — pair with LPE for full code exec + SYSTEM chain.

CVE-2025-29824.desc: CLFS driver use-after-free — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW by Storm-2460 via PipeMagic to deploy RansomEXX (Apr 2025)
CVE-2025-29824.notes: CLFS 0day used by Storm-2460 (PipeMagic → CLFS exploit → LSASS dump → RansomEXX). MSTIC + BI.ZONE analysis.

CVE-2025-30400.desc: Desktop Window Manager (DWM) Core Library EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW as 0day (May 2025)
CVE-2025-30400.notes: DWM 0day — 7th DWM EoP of 2025. Exploited ITW before patch May 2025.

CVE-2025-32701.desc: CLFS driver use-after-free EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW (MSTIC discovery, May 2025)
CVE-2025-32701.notes: CLFS UAF 0day — MSTIC discovered ITW exploitation. Part of ongoing CLFS attack dynasty (follows 2023/2024 ITW).

CVE-2025-32706.desc: CLFS driver heap buffer overflow EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW (discovered by CrowdStrike, May 2025)
CVE-2025-32706.notes: CLFS heap overflow 0day — discovered by CrowdStrike Counter Adversary Ops in late Apr 2025, reported to Microsoft.

CVE-2025-32709.desc: Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock EoP — local SYSTEM (May 2025 patch Tuesday)
CVE-2025-32709.notes: AFD.sys EoP — same driver family as CVE-2025-21418 and MS11-046. Watch for PoC.

CVE-2025-33073.desc: Windows DWM Core Library EoP — local SYSTEM (Jun 2025 patch, exploitation more likely)
CVE-2025-33073.notes: DWM Core Library EoP — exploitation more likely per Microsoft. Jun 2025 patch.

CVE-2025-38140.desc: Windows Kernel EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW as 0day (Jul 2025 Patch Tuesday)
CVE-2025-38140.notes: Windows Kernel 0day — exploited ITW Jul 2025. Limited public details.

CVE-2025-47981.desc: Windows Kernel EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW (Aug 2025 Patch Tuesday)
CVE-2025-47981.notes: Windows Kernel 0day — exploited ITW Aug 2025. Limited public details.

CVE-2025-57853.desc: Windows Win32k EoP — local SYSTEM (Sep 2025 patch, exploitation more likely)
CVE-2025-57853.notes: Win32k EoP — exploitation more likely. Sep 2025.

CVE-2025-24990.desc: Agere Modem ltmdm64.sys driver EoP — admin privileges, exploited ITW (EDR evasion vector, Oct 2025)
CVE-2025-24990.notes: Legacy modem driver 0day (ltmdm64.sys) — shipped with Windows but rarely used. Likely used for EDR evasion. Oct 2025.

CVE-2025-59230.desc: Windows improper access control EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW as 0day (Oct 2025)
CVE-2025-59230.notes: Windows kernel access control 0day — exploited ITW Oct 2025 alongside CVE-2025-24990.

CVE-2025-62215.desc: Windows Kernel race condition + double-free EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW (CISA KEV, MSTIC discovery, Nov 2025)
CVE-2025-62215.notes: Kernel race condition + double-free — CISA KEV. MSTIC internal discovery. All current Windows versions. Nov 2025.

CVE-2025-62221.desc: Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver EoP — local SYSTEM, exploited ITW (final 0day of 2025, Dec)
CVE-2025-62221.notes: Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver 0day — final ITW of 2025. Dec Patch Tuesday. All Windows 10/11.

CVE-2026-26132.desc: Windows kernel EoP — local SYSTEM (Jan 2026 disclosure, limited public detail, all modern Windows)
CVE-2026-26132.notes: Windows kernel EoP Jan 2026 — limited public details. Apply patches immediately.
